name: codebase-vector-bridge
description: Pair the Codebase Vector workspace with VS Code so prompts and selections flow live between them.

codebaseVector.workspaceUrl.description: Origin of the Codebase Vector workspace. Used to build pair URLs.

codebaseVector.defaultAgent.description: Which CLI to type into the integrated terminal when an agent target arrives.

codebaseVector.allowedOrigins.description: Extra origins (in addition to workspaceUrl + localhost) allowed to connect to the bridge. Each entry is matched as a prefix against the inbound Origin header.

codebaseVector.idleTimeoutSeconds.description: Disconnect a paired client that hasn't replied to a ping in this many seconds. Set to 0 to disable.

codebaseVector.relayUrl.description: Optional cross-machine relay base URL (e.g. https://codebase-vector.example.com). When set, the extension also publishes selections/open-file events to the relay so a browser on a different network can pair via 'relay:<sessionId>'.
